TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08

JUDGE WILLIAM A. SKILLMAN, DPADILLA, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR TRIAL BY JURY. PLTF. PRESENT W/ COUNSEL CLIFFORD FRIED, DEFT PRESENT W/ COUNSEL OF RECORD LEANNA DAWYDIAK AND ASSOCIATE COUNSEL JOSEPH BRAVO. PLTF'S MOTIONS IN LIMINE DISCUSSED, ARGUED AND RULED ON THE RECORD. PROSPECTIVE JURORS ARRIVED IN COURT. ROLL CALL MADE AND ATTENDANCE MARKED, SWORN. 12 JURORS CALLED AND SEATED ON THE JURY BOX. VOIR DIRE BY COURT AND BOTH COUNSEL. SEVERAL JURORS EXCUSED FOR CAUSE AND HARDSHIPS. PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE EXERCISED BY BOTH SIDED. 12 JURORS EMPANELED AND SWORN. TRIAL CONT'D TO 1/16/97 TO SELECT 2 ALTERNATES AND TRIAL, JURY ADMONISHED.
